# [America This Week, August 30, 2024: "The Campaign Rebrand"](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1042&post_id=148287209&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=29l7o&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjozODA2NjI4LCJwb3N0X2lkIjoxNDgyODcyMDksImlhdCI6MTcyNTAyNjQ2MSwiZXhwIjoxNzI3NjE4NDYxLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTA0MiIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.ZoVkjd64_JgQtgUOARlWYZ2tv0oj5VhCDznQwwdm5rc)

### Upside-down world keeps spinning as the blues campaign on a border wall. Also, a fascinating inspiration for a pop culture classic: "In Dreams Begin Responsibilities" by Delmore Schwartz

and [Walter Kirn](https://substack.com/@walterkirn)

Aug 30

∙
